unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：“闹踢”——调皮的孩子又闹又踢。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Look at the little dog. It's crying.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：弄碎（crack）了心爱的玩具，就会伤心哭泣（cry）。
谐音记忆法：“汉堡”——因为hungry，所以想吃汉堡。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The ducks are eating our sandwiches!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：sand(沙子) + which(哪一个)——哪一个(which)三明治掉进了沙子(sand)里？

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In this photo, we are in the mountains.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：mount(登上) + ain(名词后缀)——可以去登上的地方就是高山。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The sun is shining and the wind is blowing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：“不漏”——风吹过来，门窗关紧一点不漏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Simon and I are playing hide-and-seek.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：hide(藏起来) + and(和) + seek(寻找)——有藏有找，就是捉迷藏游戏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And this is strange, because it is the middle of the night.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：stranger(陌生人)的举动常常让人觉得很strange(奇怪的)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: "The sun is very bad. He spoils my time," she says.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：“死男孩(s-poil)”——调皮捣蛋破坏了大家的计划。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We had a picnic in the park.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 图像记忆法：带着漂亮的野餐垫，在大自然里拍美丽的picture(照片)。
